evals.prompt: Review a project test strategy. Current suite has many unit tests, three slow end-to-end tests in PR, no nightly lane, and no release checklist. The product has authentication, imports, and background jobs.
evals.expected_output: Risk-based test portfolio with local/PR/nightly/release layers, harness independence review, oracle strategy, and P0/P1/P2 roadmap.

evals.prompt: Our tests feel weak. What should we do?
evals.expected_output: Asks for or states assumptions about risk profile and current test layers; provides a conservative strategy outline without inventing project details.
assertions: Does not invent specific product behavior

evals.prompt: Given this one endpoint spec, generate exact test cases.
evals.expected_output: Should indicate this is better handled by testkit-case-design and not produce a broad project strategy.
